zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Lloyd於1427年出生在威爾士時，她的父親David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai27歲，母親Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn25歲。她和Roger Wolcott至少有6個兒子。她去世於1481年9月1日在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Lloyd于1427年出生在威尔士时，她的父亲David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai27岁，母亲Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn25岁。她和Roger Wolcott至少有6个儿子。她去世于1481年9月1日在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lloyd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: descriptive nickname from Welsh llwyd ‘gray’. InWelsh the color term llwyd also includes shades of brown, andit is likely that, when used with reference to younger men,llwyd denoted brown or mouse-colored hair.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Lloyd was born in 1427, in Wales, her father, David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai, was 27 and her mother, Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn, was 25. She had at least 6 sons with Roger Wolcott. She died on 1 September 1481, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Lloyd est née en 1427, à Galles, son père, David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils avec Roger Wolcott. Elle est décédée le 1 septembre 1481, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Lloyd 1427 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai 27 und ihre Mutter Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn 25. Sie hatte mit Roger Wolcott mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb am 1. September 1481 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Lloyd è nata il nel 1427 nel Galles, sua padre, David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli con Roger Wolcott. Morì il 1 settembre 1481, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Lloydが1427年にウェールズで生まれた時，父David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llaiは27歳，母Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarnは25歳であった。彼女はRoger Wolcottとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1481年9月1日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Lloyd(이)가 1427년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Roger Wolcott(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 9월 1일 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Lloyd родилась в 1427 г. в местности Уэльс, её отцу по имени David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Roger Wolcott. Она умерла 1 сентября 1481 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Lloyd nació en 1427, en Gales, su papá, David Lloyd ap Griffith Fychan Lord of Llai, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Damasen Mathavarn, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Roger Wolcott. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1481, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 54 años.
